answer:
We first rewrite \( F(z) = \frac{30z^2 - 12z}{6z^2 - 5z + 1} \).  
Dividing numerator and denominator by 6 gives \( F(z) = \frac{5z^2 - 2z}{z^2 - \frac{5}{6}z + \frac{1}{6}} \).  
Performing partial fraction expansion and taking the inverse z-transform yields \( f(n) = [3(1/2)^n + 2(1/3)^n] u[n] \).

\boxed{H}
